title: To The Love Of Andr� And Gwen
content:
If after times
    Should pay the least attention to these rhymes,
    I bid them learn
    'Tis not my own heart here
    That doth so often seem to break and burn - 
    O no such thing! - 
    Nor is it my own dear
    Always I sing:
    But, as a scrivener in the market-place,
    I sit and write for lovers, him or her,
    Making a song to match each lover's case - 
    A trifling gift sometimes the gods confer!

    (After STRATO)
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Le Gallienne delivers a powerful performance in "To The Love Of Andr� And Gwen"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
